name: amazon_multi_span_analysis_excerpt
source_text: AWS grew 17.5% year over year and now has over a 123,000,000,000 annualized revenue run rate. At the end of the quarter at June 30, that was $195,000,000,000 so that's up about 25% year over year.
excerpt: AWS grew 17.5% year over year and now has over a $123,000,000,000 annualized revenue run rate... backlog was $195,000,000,000, up about 25% year over year.
claim: +15: AWS revenue growth and backlog signal durable cloud demand

name: amazon_operating_income_paraphrase
source_text: Operating income was $19,200,000,000 which is $1,700,000,000 above the high end of our guidance range.
